_publications._publicationTitle: PET Imaging of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with a Fluorine-18 Labeled Tryptophan Radiotracer.

_contextSnippet: The bone uptake in the triple mutant group remained stable during the 90 min scans (1.49 ± 0.65 ID%/g at 5 min vs. 1.44 ± 0.45 ID%/g at 90 min), further indicating the stability of L-[18F]FETrp towards in vivo defluorination.
resourceName: Trp53, Nf1, Suz12 triple mutant mice
details: Stable bone uptake during 90 min scans (1.49 ± 0.65 ID%/g at 5 min vs. 1.44 ± 0.45 ID%/g at 90 min), indicating stability towards defluorination
